title: Keystone Cooperative selects Scott Logue to lead nearly $3B agricultural co-op
description:
Scott Logue has been selected as the next CEO of Indianapolis-based Keystone Cooperative. Logue will succeed Kevin Still, who is retiring Sept. 1 after more than 40 years in the agriculture cooperative industry.

title: Indiana SNAP payment error rate rises
description:
Indiana’s payment error rate for the nation’s largest anti-hunger program rose last year — which, without improvements, could cost the state more than $140 million annually as soon as next year.

title: Northwest Indiana company details leadership transition after owner’s death
description:
Northwestern Indiana Telephone Co., a communications services provider headquartered in the Porter County town of Hebron, announced the passing of its owner, Rhys Mussman, on Thursday.

title: Indiana lighting company sues contractor over alleged false representations about its products
description:
An Indianapolis-based energy service company and LED lighting manufacturer is suing an Arkansas contractor after the contractor allegedly made misrepresentations about the value and quality of the company’s products.

description:
